Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Super Psy Bolt", "cost": ["Psychic"], "convertedEnergyCost": 1, "damage": "20", "text": ""}]
FlavorText: Their ribbonlike feelers increase their psychic power. They are always staring at something.

Attack_Texts: Look at the top 5 cards of your opponent's deck and put them back in any order.|
FlavorText: They use hypnosis to control people and Pokémon. Tales of Gothorita leading people astray are told in every corner.

FlavorText: With its thin, veil-like arms wrapped around the body of its opponent, it sinks to the ocean floor.

FlavorText: Compressing the energy from its internal core lets it fire off an attack capable of blowing away a mountain.

FlavorText: Said to be an ancestor of bird Pokémon, they were unable to fly and moved about by hopping from one branch to another.

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Rock Throw", "cost": ["Fighting", "Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 2, "damage": "100", "text": ""}]
FlavorText: They are intelligent and will cooperate to catch prey. From the ground, they use a running start to take flight.

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Kick", "cost": ["Fighting"], "convertedEnergyCost": 1, "damage": "20", "text": ""}]
FlavorText: In fights, they dominate with onslaughts of flowing, continuous attacks. With their sharp claws, they cut enemies.

FlavorText: It wields the fur on its arms like a whip. Its arm attacks come with such rapidity that they cannot even be seen.

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Retaliate", "cost": ["Fighting", "Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 2, "damage": "50+", "text": "If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does 80 more damage."}, {"name": "Land Crush", "cost": ["Fighting", "Fighting", "Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 3, "damage": "100", "text": ""}]

FlavorText: This Pokémon came to the defense of Pokémon that had lost their homes in a war among humans.

FlavorText: They steal from people for fun, but their victims can't help but forgive them. Their deceptively cute act is perfect.

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Knock Off", "cost": ["Darkness"], "convertedEnergyCost": 1, "damage": "50", "text": "Discard a random card from your opponent's hand."}]
Attack_Texts: Discard a random card from your opponent's hand.
FlavorText: These Pokémon vanish and appear unexpectedly. Many Trainers are drawn to their beautiful form and fur.
